detail: Building lag-based machine-learning forecasts and recursive predictions using GPU acceleration when available across LightGBM and XGBoost. Revenue lag modeling is enabled. SignalForge is testing whether tree models can capture nonlinear revenue patterns.

lightgbm.label: Lightgbm
lightgbm.note: Building lag-based machine-learning forecasts and recursive predictions using GPU acceleration when available across LightGBM and XGBoost. Revenue lag modeling is enabled. SignalForge is testing whether tree models can capture nonlinear revenue patterns.

log.detail: Forecast engine is starting up and validating the saved run settings before model training begins.
Normalizing dates, targets, and series structure so the engine can remove unusable rows before training begins.
Preparing horizon, frequency, and tuning settings for 452 clean rows across 1 series from 2025-01-03 to 2026-03-31.
Forecast horizon is 90D, frequency is D, tuning depth is aggressive, and compute mode is cuda / prefer_gpu.
Registering selected model families, session counts, and compute device choices.
Calculating naive and seasonal benchmark forecasts so every advanced model has a simple business baseline to beat.

Building lag-based machine-learning forecasts and recursive predictions using GPU acceleration when available across LightGBM and XGBoost. Revenue lag modeling is enabled. SignalForge is testing whether tree models can capture nonlinear revenue patterns.
